name: Cozy Delay
explanation: A warm, dark, short bucket-brigade-style analog delay. A compact interpolated delay line (~20-300 ms) feeds a bounded feedback path; each repeat is made progressively darker and softer by a cascaded low-pass inside the loop plus gentle per-pass saturation, so a string of echoes melts from a present slapback into a soft, intimate shadow. A faint wow drift adds vintage warmth. Controls: Time, Feedback, Tone and dry/wet Mix.
